title: scholar-simulate response
description: One checkpointed model response line in responses.jsonl. Idempotency key is custom_id.

custom_id.description: Join key 'condition|persona_id|item_id|rep' set at request time.

input_tokens.description: Billed input tokens (for the cost ledger).

output_tokens.description: Billed output tokens (for the cost ledger).

cached_tokens.description: Input tokens served from prompt cache (billed at ~10%).

error.description: Non-empty if the call failed; such rows are re-queued on --resume.
